title: Foreign car companies bet on technology to hang onto once-lucrative China auto market
summary_full: U.S., Korean and German automakers announced a rush of new, tech-enabled cars at the Beijing Auto Show as they battle a sales slump
summary_public: U.S., Korean and German automakers announced a rush of new, tech-enabled cars at the Beijing Auto Show as they battle a sales slump

DE.label: neutral
DE.evidence: German automakers announced a rush of new cars
